% This is generated by ESQL's MvMedianAbsoluteDeviationTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.

## Description

Reduce a multivalued field to a single valued field containing the median absolute deviation of the values.

::::{note}
If the field has an even number of values, the medians will be calculated as the average of the middle two values. If the value is not a floating point number, the averages are rounded towards 0.
::::
